emittedEvidence.summary:
Official producer source for **Lagavulin Distillers Edition** is the Malts/Diageo product page: it confirms the bottle is **Lagavulin Distillers Edition Single Malt Scotch Whisky**, part of the **Distillers Edition** range, and describes it as **double-matured in ex-bodega Pedro Ximénez cask wood**. The US official page specifically references the **2006** vintage/release shown there. ([malts.com](https://www.malts.com/en-us/products/lagavulin-distillers-edition-single-malt-scotch-whisky-750ml?utm_source=openai))

An additional Malts page for a current gift pack version confirms the standard b

Official producer source for **Lagavulin Distillers Edition** is the Malts/Diageo product page: it confirms the bottle is **Lagavulin Distillers Edition Single Malt Scotch Whisky**, part of the **Distillers Edition** range, and describes it as **double-matured in ex-bodega Pedro Ximénez cask wood**. The US official page specifically references the **2006** vintage/release shown there. ([malts.com](https://www.malts.com/en-us/products/lagavulin-distillers-edition-single-malt-scotch-whisky-750ml?utm_source=openai))
